electroacoustic.directivity: 90° (vertical) x 60° (horizontal), ellipsoid; rotatable logo allows portrait or landscape orientation
electroacoustic.components: LF: 1 x 12" neodymium transducer in bass-reflex cabinet with L-Vents laminar vented ports; HF: 1 x 3" neodymium compression driver on ellipsoid waveguide, coaxially mounted; internal passive crossover
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak SPL at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [X12] preset

operating_modes: Low-latency monitor mode ([X12_MO] reduces latency to 1.18 ms on LA8 and 0.84 ms on LA4X/LA12X)

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), interchangeable IN/LINK; passive 2-way pinout uses pins 1+/1- (pins 2+/2- not linked)
connection.breakouts: SP 4-point speakON loudspeaker cables (4 mm²); DOSUB-LA8 / DO breakout cables for multi-enclosure runs from a single amplifier output bank

physical.dimensions_mm: 496 (H) x 430 (W) x 375 (D) approx., trapezoidal cabinet (front 430 mm, rear 341 mm)
physical.cabinet: First grade Baltic birch and beech plywood; dark grey brown Pantone 426C standard, pure white RAL 9010 or custom RAL on order
physical.rigging_hardware: 2x ergonomic handles, M8 DIN580-compatible threaded insert (secondary safety), 4x M10 threaded inserts, 2x 35 mm pole sockets, built-in risers for 35°/55° monitor angles, bottom runners

modes: Pole-mounted (35 mm sockets, optionally on KS21/SB18/SB15m sub)
rigging_accessories: X-US1215 (short U-bracket, shared with X15 HiQ)
X-UTILT (tilt wall-mount accessory for negative site angles)

usage: Compact passive coaxial point source for short-throw FOH, front fill, under-balcony and distributed install duty where smooth off-axis tonal balance and discreet sightlines matter.
Doubles as a stage wedge using the [X12_MO] preset and built-in risers, which set a 35° or 55° floor angle; a low-latency variant of [X12_MO] cuts processing delay for in-line monitoring.
Each X12 needs one amplifier output channel; pack densely on a single amp - up to 12 on LA12X, 14 on LA7.16(i), 4 on LA4X (and 8 on LA8 per the manual).
Pair roughly 1:1 with a subwoofer to extend LF: SB15m reaches down to ~40 Hz, SB18 and KS21 lower still, using the matched [SB15_100]/[SB18_100]/[KS21_100] sub presets with a 100 Hz crossover.
Versatile rigging covers pole, wall, ceiling, flown (X-BAR plus CLAMP250) and ground-stack; note SB18i and KS21i subs are not mechanically rated for pole-mounting the X12.

Fixed 90° x 60° ellipsoid pattern and rotatable front logo let it deploy in portrait or landscape, but coverage is not steerable - choose orientation to match the room rather than expecting array-style shaping.
